title: Question Words: Advanced
description: When, why, how, and by what — complex questions for real conversations
intro: Now you know gì, ai, ở đâu, bao nhiêu. Time to add: khi nào (when), tại sao (why), thế nào (how), and bằng gì (by what means).

questions.prompt: How do you say 'when' in Vietnamese?
questions.explanation: 'khi nào' = when. 'Khi nào bạn đi?' = When do you go?

questions.prompt: How do you say 'why' in Vietnamese?
questions.explanation: 'tại sao' = why. Can also say 'vì sao'. 'Tại sao bạn học tiếng Việt?' = Why do you study Vietnamese?

questions.prompt: How do you say 'how' (in what way)?
questions.explanation: 'thế nào' = how/what's it like. 'Phở thế nào?' = How's the phở?

questions.prompt: ___ ___ bạn đến Việt Nam? (When do you come to Vietnam?)
questions.explanation: 'Khi nào' at the start or end of the sentence: 'Khi nào bạn đến VN?' or 'Bạn đến VN khi nào?'

questions.prompt: Bạn đi ___ ___? (How do you get there? / By what?)
questions.explanation: 'bằng gì' = by what (means of transport). 'Bạn đi bằng gì?' = How do you go? / By what?
'bao lâu' = how long (time). 'Đi bao lâu?' = How long does it take?

questions.prompt: ___ ___ bạn không ăn? (Why don't you eat?)
questions.explanation: 'Tại sao' starts the question: 'Why you not eat?'

questions.prompt: Which question asks about transport method?
questions.explanation: 'bằng gì' specifically asks about the means/method: by bus, by motorbike, etc.

questions.prompt: Thời tiết hôm nay ___ ___? (How's the weather today?)
questions.explanation: 'thế nào' asks for description/quality: 'Weather today HOW?'
'bao xa' = how far (distance). 'Đi bao xa?' = How far is it?

questions.prompt: Từ đây đến sân bay ___ ___? (How far from here to the airport?)
questions.explanation: 'bao xa' for distance: 'From here to airport HOW FAR?'

questions.prompt: How do you ask 'How long have you been in Vietnam?'
questions.correct: Bạn ở Việt Nam bao lâu rồi?
options: Bạn ở Việt Nam bao lâu rồi?
questions.explanation: 'bao lâu rồi' = how long already. The 'rồi' indicates ongoing duration

questions.prompt: Bạn đi Đà Nẵng ___ ___? (By what do you go to Da Nang?)
questions.explanation: Asking about transport: 'You go Da Nang BY WHAT?' → bằng máy bay (by plane), bằng xe (by car)

questions.prompt: Which question word can go at either the START or END of a sentence?
questions.explanation: 'Khi nào bạn đi?' = 'Bạn đi khi nào?' Both work. Most other question words have a fixed position

questions.prompt: Món này nấu ___ ___? (How is this dish cooked?)
questions.explanation: 'thế nào' for method/description: 'This dish cook HOW?'

questions.prompt: What's the difference between 'thế nào' and 'bằng gì'?
questions.correct: 'thế nào' = how (general), 'bằng gì' = by what (specific means)
options: 'thế nào' = how (general), 'bằng gì' = by what (specific means)
'thế nào' is formal, 'bằng gì' is casual
'thế nào' is Northern, 'bằng gì' is Southern
questions.explanation: 'Đi thế nào?' = How do you go? (general). 'Đi bằng gì?' = By what means? (expects: bus, car, plane...)
